highlights.text: As I stated at the close: “We are closing today at a huge inflection point with ES closing at support of its macro uptrend channel from May (shown in green below) AND support of the multi-week yellow triangle…My lean is bulls can try a final bounce here with 6694/6702 first up, 6715-17 2nd, then 6731 above.” We ripped to 6715 3pm.
As traders kniw, I long on Failed Breakdowns - with institutions.
Case in point: On Tuesday morning, ES saw a monster Failed Breakdown at 6605 where we swept a big low and recovered.
This deep sell setup - as always - another big Failed Breakdown overnight.
I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “Obvious setup here the recovery of Tuesday’s 6593 daily low.” We held 6572, recovered 6593 overnight, then ripped all day.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into some of the core Failed Breakdowns we had this week.
I specified this target at the close on Monday, stating: “Targets are 6715-23.
This back-test remains a magnet .” We rallied 158 points from Tuesday’s long, hit 6766 exact to set the high of week, then crashed to 6572 ultimately overnight.

post_title: Was Thursday Nights SPX Collapse And Bounce Capitulation For Bears? Or Simply A Dead Cat Bounce? Oct 20 Plan
